author: kemayo
description: Automatically detect strings using regular expressions and turn them into links in reading view. Useful for stock symbols, issue tracking, etc.

manifest.author: David Lynch
manifest.description: This is a plugin for Obsidian that allows users to define custom link formats
manifest.name: Smart Links

name: Smart Links

releases.author: kemayo
releases.description: Fixed an issue when running on iOS caused by using a lookbehind regular expression

releases.author: kemayo
releases.description: Replacement patterns that began with a non-word character (e.g. `#\d+`) weren't working.

releases.author: kemayo
releases.description: Initial release with basic functionality. Only works in reading mode currently.
